publications.title: MCP4IFC: IFC-Based Building Design Using Large Language Models
publications.authorsHtml: Bharathi Kannan Nithyanantham, Tobias Sesterhenn, Ashwin Nedungadi, Sergio Peral Garijo, Janis Zenkner, Christian Bartelt, Stefan Lüdtke
publications.description: An open-source framework enabling LLMs to create, edit, and query IFC building models through the Model Context Protocol, combining predefined BIM tools with dynamic code generation via retrieval-augmented generation.

publications.title: Depth Fusion in Transformer-Based Video Object Detection
publications.description: Investigated depth-aware fusion techniques integrated into transformer-based architectures for object detection and video object detection.

selectedProjects.title: RGB-D Video Object Detection
selectedProjects.summary: Depth + RGB fusion for transformer-based video object detection.

selectedProjects.title: Prioritor
selectedProjects.summary: Emergency care system for sharing patient data from ambulance to hospital.

projects.title: RGB-D Video Object Detection
paragraphsHtml: Developed a multimodal fusion framework that integrates depth information with RGB data in transformer-based object detectors. Explored multiple fusion strategies (early, mid, and late fusion) and evaluated their impact on detection accuracy under occlusion, blur, and cluttered environments.
This work is part of my master's thesis at the University of Siegen (2024).

projects.title: Feature Selection for Recommender Systems
paragraphsHtml: Surveyed and compared feature selection strategies for collaborative filtering and content-based recommendation. Evaluated filter, wrapper, and embedded methods on standard benchmarks and analyzed their trade-offs between performance and computational cost.
Seminar project at the University of Siegen (2023).

projects.title: Prioritor
paragraphsHtml: An ambulance-to-hospital patient information system designed for emergency healthcare workflows. The system captures vital patient data during transport and transmits it to the receiving hospital in real time, enabling faster triage and preparation.
Reached the semifinal stage at the India Innovation Challenge Design Contest (DST India & Texas Instruments, 2021).

projects.title: Bcoin – Cryptocurrency Implementation
paragraphsHtml: A cryptocurrency built from scratch to understand blockchain fundamentals. Implements proof-of-work mining, transaction validation, wallet management, and a peer-to-peer network protocol.

projects.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
paragraphsHtml: Comprehensive collection of data structures and algorithm implementations with explanations. Covers arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, sorting, searching, and more.

publications.title: MCP4IFC: IFC-Based Building Design Using Large Language Models
publications.authorsHtml: Bharathi Kannan Nithyanantham, Tobias Sesterhenn, Ashwin Nedungadi, Sergio Peral Garijo, Janis Zenkner, Christian Bartelt, Stefan Lüdtke
publications.description: An open-source framework enabling large language models to create, edit, and query IFC building models through the Model Context Protocol. Combines predefined BIM tools with dynamic code generation using retrieval-augmented generation, allowing LLMs to perform complex architectural design tasks via natural language instructions without direct BIM software interaction.

publications.title: Depth Fusion in Transformer-Based Video Object Detection
publications.description: Investigated multiple depth-aware fusion strategies (early, mid, and late fusion) integrated into transformer-based architectures (DETR, Deformable-DETR) for both image-level and video-level object detection. Evaluated on SUN RGB-D and custom video benchmarks, demonstrating improved robustness under occlusion, motion blur, and scene clutter compared to RGB-only baselines.
